ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula: AND(NOT($User.BypassValidationRules__c),AND( RecordType.DeveloperName = "Client_delivery_request", ISPICKVAL( Type , "Solvency"), NDA_signed__c =False, ISPICKVAL(Status, "In Service")))
ValidationRule.errorMessage: You need to have a NDA signed in order to closed the work together process
